title: VPN Access Policy
content: Employees must connect via TalentTech Global VPN (Cisco AnyConnect or OpenVPN client) to access internal portals. The standard remote connection address is vpn.talenttech.com. If access is denied or connection timeouts occur, verify network connectivity or request a ticket. Access is limited to authenticated users. VPN credentials must not be shared.

title: MFA Login & Reset Policy
content: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is mandatory for all employee accounts. If you experience MFA login failures or lose your authenticator device, you must verify your identity through your registered backup email or phone number. System administrators can reset your MFA configurations upon request. Never share authentication codes.

title: Salary and Direct Deposit Cycles
content: Salaries are processed monthly and credited on the 28th of each month. In case the 28th falls on a weekend or public holiday, payments are processed on the last preceding business day. Salary slips can be downloaded from the HR portal under the 'My Finances' tab. Issues with missing or delayed salary must be routed directly to the Payroll Department.

title: Leave Accrual and Approval Workflow
content: All employees accrue 1.5 days of paid annual leave per month. Leaves must be requested via the Employee Portal at least 5 business days in advance. Line managers must review and approve/reject leave requests within 48 hours. Medical and emergency leave do not require advance notice but must be accompanied by supporting documents.

title: Anti-Harassment and Safe Workplace
content: TalentTech Solutions is committed to a safe work environment free from harassment, discrimination, or retaliation. Any incidents of bullying or harassment must be reported immediately. HR conducts private investigations of all complaints. Reports can be submitted via email to hr-manager@talenttech.com or through the portal.

title: Data Breach and Security Incident Response
content: A security breach includes unauthorized access to customer records, credential leakage, malware infections, or suspicious network scans. In case of a suspected breach, isolate the affected machine from the network immediately and report the issue to security-manager@talenttech.com. Do not delete files or shut down servers.

title: Network Outage Escalation Plan
content: In the event of a network outage or corporate system downtime (such as email server down or portal unavailable), the Operations team must be notified. Critical outages impacting more than 50 employees must be resolved within 4 hours. The Operations manager (operations-manager@talenttech.com) is notified for all critical events.

title: Server Maintenance and Logins
content: All production server logins require SSH key authentication and authorization through the Jump Host. Root login is disabled. Production server maintenance windows are scheduled weekly on Sundays between 02:00 AM and 04:00 AM UTC.
